basic_details.job_title: HBCHRC Adhoc Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital & Research Centre (HBCHRC)
basic_details.short_information: Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital & Research Centre (HBCHRC) Adhoc Assistant Professor Notification 2026 has been released on 29 April 2026 on the official website tmc.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the HBCHRC Adhoc Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Ch / D.N.B. (Head & Neck Oncology), M.Ch / D.N.B. in Surgical Oncology, M.S./ D.N.B.
qualification.details: M.Ch / D.N.B. (Head & Neck Oncology) OR M.Ch / D.N.B. in Surgical Oncology OR M.S./ D.N.B. (General Surgery / ENT) OR Equivalent postgraduate degree recognized by National Medical Commission with 3 Years’ experience in Surgical / Head & Neck Oncology in a teaching Hospital after the postgraduate degree. Candidates with less than 3 years’ experience after post-graduation will be considered for lower grade, if there are no suitably experienced candidates.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for HBCHRC recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Adhoc Assistant Professor Head & Neck Oncology post at HBCHRC is scheduled for 12 May 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: The required qualification is M.Ch / D.N.B. (Head & Neck Oncology) OR M.Ch / D.N.B. in Surgical Oncology OR M.S./ D.N.B. (General Surgery / ENT) with 3 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Adhoc Assistant Professor position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 45 years. Age relaxation details, if any, would be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Adhoc Assistant Professor role?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 1,28,000/- to Rs. 1,52,000/- per month, depending on experience and qualifications.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Adhoc Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Adhoc Assistant Professor Head & Neck Oncology post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for General/OBC categories, implying it might be nil. It's advisable to check the official notification for complete details.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital & Research Centre (HBCHRC) in Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or ad-hoc position?
faq.answer: This is an Ad-hoc position, as indicated by the job type and post name.
